title: Fig. 2. A in Prevalence and geographic distribution of Babesia conradae and detection of Babesia vogeli in free-ranging California coyotes (Canis latrans)
author: Javeed, Nadia N.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 2. A) PCR positivity (indicated by color) of coyotes (Canis latrans) carcasses recovered (▴) in each county between 2015 and 2019. B) Map of southern California including Los Angeles, Orange, Ventura, San Bernardino, Riverside, and San Diego counties showing B. conradae PCR positivity (indicated by color) in each city where coyote carcasses were recovered. The number of coyotes sampled at each location is indicated by the size of the circle.
